basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 25-05-2026 on the official website of IIT Roorkee. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech / M.Tech / M.Sc or equivalent in Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology / Applied Discipline in Engineering and Science with GATE/NET
qualification.details: B.Tech / M.Tech / M.Sc or equivalent in Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology / Applied Discipline in Engineering and Science with GATE/NET

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 is Junior Research Fellow. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow post in the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position is Rs. 37000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech / M.Tech / M.Sc or equivalent degree in Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology / Applied Discipline in Engineering and Science with GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 16 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the location of the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee, Uttarakhand, Roorkee - 247667.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview and Document Verification.
